questions.question: In Dark Field TEM, the image is formed by using?
Which of the following components is adjusted to obtain a Dark Field image in TEM?
In Dark Field TEM, why are diffracted beams selected instead of the direct beam?

answers.a: To observe defects in the crystal structure

questions.question: In Centered Dark Field (CDF) imaging, the selected diffraction spot is positioned:

answers.a: At the center of the optical axis
answers.d: Near the edge of the condenser lens

questions.question: The main advantage of WBDF over conventional dark field imaging is:

answers.b: Improved contrast and spatial resolution for defects
